facilities.name: Ghaziabad Municipal Corporation - Dundahera Transfer / Collection Point
facilities.address: Dundahera / Sector area (serves Crossing Republik area), Ghaziabad, UP
facilities.notes: Municipal transfer / primary collection hub used by Ghaziabad Nagar Nigam for mixed municipal solid waste and segregation. Best for general/non-recyclable & food waste drop-off; hazardous usually processed separately.
source: Dundahera locality coordinates & municipal transfer station references

facilities.name: Ecowork (recycling / material recovery) - Ghaziabad (Meerut Road / Industrial area)
facilities.address: Meerut Road Industrial Area / nearby Ghaziabad industrial corridor (Ecowork pickup / recycling service)
facilities.notes: Private recycling partner handling plastics, metals, glass, cans and many post-consumer recyclables; often supports collection drives and business pickup.

facilities.name: E-Waste Collection / Authorized Recycler (Ghaziabad area)
facilities.address: Authorized e-waste recycler / collection center serving Ghaziabad (local collection points / aggregators)
facilities.notes: Collection point for batteries, small electronics, chargers, etc. (Search for 'e-waste collection Ghaziabad' to find specific collection schedule / contact).
source: E-waste collection / authorized recycler public listings

facilities.name: Hazmat / Hazardous Waste Collection Point (Regional / private)
facilities.address: Hazmat collection service (serves Ghaziabad region) — contact local municipal office for drop-off of batteries/chemicals
facilities.notes: Hazardous materials (batteries, bulbs, chemical containers, paint buckets) should be delivered to a specialized collection center. Municipal or authorized hazardous waste handlers may require appointments.
source: Municipal/hazardous waste handling policy and regional e-waste / hazardous listings

facilities.name: Local Scrap Aggregator / Recyclers (Crossings Republik / Sahibabad / Ghaziabad)
facilities.address: Multiple local scrap dealers and aggregators around Sahibabad / Crossings Republik (doorstep pickup often available)
facilities.notes: Small local scrap buyers accept plastics, metal, glass, cardboard, and many recyclables — good for mixed household recyclables.
source: Local business listings / Justdial style aggregator pages

facilities.name: City Waste Center / Bulk Waste Drop-off (Ghaziabad)
facilities.address: Main City Waste Center (Ghaziabad municipal) — serves the Crossing Republik region; open hours and acceptance depend on municipal rules
facilities.notes: Municipal center for general municipal solid waste (bulk drop-off, not for hazardous or e-waste).

facilities.name: Karo Sambhav / Reverse Logistics Partner (collection aggregator)
facilities.address: Collection points / partner outlets in NCR (search Karo Sambhav partners for nearest collection point)
facilities.notes: Karo Sambhav and similar e-waste/takeback firms run localized collection drives / partner shops. Useful for responsible battery and e-waste disposal.
source: Karo Sambhav public partner listings / collection programs
